summary: SPK RC 29 sua worker SQLite tren DSM: het xung dot transaction khi worker inline claim job song song.
changes: Worker SQLite trong SPK gio claim transcode job bang cau UPDATE ... RETURNING nguyen tu, bo hẳn BEGIN/COMMIT thu cong gay loi cannot start a transaction within a transaction.
Auto-requeue, queue-depth va reschedule cua worker duoc tach rieng cho SQLite/Postgres de worker inline tren DSM khong dung chung duong transaction cua Docker/Postgres.
Bo sung regression test mo phong 2 slot worker SQLite claim job song song de khoa chat bug worker heartbeat cu tren NAS.
